SELECT 
username
 , cast(uri_3 as varchar(2000)) uri_3 
FROM  dss_metadata.services_passport
WHERE  domain = 'redcap_bcc'

INSERT INTO [redcap_bcc].[p579_travel_form_consult_ct_sim] 
(
[record_id],

[travel_comments_consult], 
[travel_completed_consult], 
[travel_completed_by_consult],

)

      ,[redcap_repeat_instance]
      ,[redcap_repeat_instrument]
      ,[travel_form_consult_ct_sim_complete]
      ,[travel_companion_consult]
      ,[companion_lastname_consult]
      ,[companion_firstname_consult]
      ,[travel_from_consult]
      ,[travel_to_consult]
      ,[outbound_date_consult]
      ,[return_date_consult]
      ,[accommodation_consult]
      ,[accommodation_notes_consult]
      ,[car_rental_consult]
      ,[car_rental_detail_consult]
      ,[travel_comments_consult]
      ,[travel_completed_consult]
      ,[travel_completed_by_consult]      
      ,GETDATE() as load_dt_tm
  FROM [redcap_bcc_temp].[stg_p579]
  where [redcap_repeat_instrument] = 'travel_form_consult_ct_sim'

)

      ,[redcap_repeat_instance]

where [redcap_repeat_instrument] = 'verify_us_invoice'
